kiosk.Title: Gorge Underground: Under New Ownership in 2026
kiosk.Summary: Gorge Underground, one of the region’s most recognizable adventure attractions, has officially changed ownership.
Facts: The operation is now led by Chip Hart, a familiar figure in the local tourism scene and the owner of Out the Top Adventures.
The transition marks a new chapter for the popular underground kayaking and boat‑tour destination.
Early indications suggest that current services will continue uninterrupted while Hart evaluates
Further updates will be shared as new plans or operational changes are announced.

kiosk.Title: Submit an Update
kiosk.Summary: Updates & changes related to business & commerce can be shown here. To submit a new listing, contact us for more information.
